body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, attached is the FOIA activity log through {DATE}. We received {NUM} new requests this period; {NUM} are pending response within the statutory deadline. Notable items: two requests from {LAST} regarding public works contracts and one from {BIZ} on zoning variances. No extensions have been granted yet. I will flag any requests that require your personal review before we respond. Let me know if you have questions.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, thanks for the update. Please flag the {BIZ} request directly to me — I want to review before we release any zoning documents. Everything else can proceed per standard process.

body_tmpl: Karen, FOIA request {CASE} came in on {DATE} from {FIRST} {LAST} asking for all vendor invoices over {AMOUNT} from the past two fiscal years. Finance pulled the initial batch but we're still missing records from Public Works. I need to send an extension notice by {DATE}. Can you confirm Public Works can have documents to me by {DATE}? Five business days should be enough time on our end to compile and redact.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I spoke with Frank. PW can get you the records by {DATE}. Go ahead and send the extension notice.

subject_tmpl: Liquor License Renewal – {BIZ} – Board Agenda Item
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the annual liquor license renewal for {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} is due on the {DATE} agenda. The applicant submitted all required documents on time and fees of {AMOUNT} have been received. No outstanding code violations per Sandra Pulaski's office. I am preparing the resolution for your signature and will have it on your desk by {DATE}. Please let me know if you want me to add any conditions or if the matter should be held pending further review.

Sandra, before I process the business license renewal for {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}, can you confirm there are no open code cases against this property? The renewal application came in on {DATE} and the license expires {DATE}. Also please verify the dumpster enclosure was brought into compliance following your inspection last {season}. I need a clearance memo by {DATE} so I can include it in the board packet.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I checked our system — {BIZ} has one open case, {CASE}, for an unsecured rear fence. The enclosure issue was resolved. I'll send the formal clearance once {CASE} is closed, which should happen after my re-inspection on {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Ordinance {NUM} Ready for Signature – Business License Fee Schedule
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, Ordinance {NUM} adopting the updated business license fee schedule has been approved by the Village Board at the {DATE} regular meeting. The enrolled copy is attached. Please sign and return to my office so I can record and publish it per statute. The effective date is {DATE}. If you need the attorney's final opinion letter before signing, I can get that from David's office today.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I'll sign this afternoon. Please make sure a copy goes to Finance so David can update the billing system before the effective date.

subject_tmpl: FOIA Records Request – Finance Documents – Due {DATE}
body_tmpl: David, I received FOIA request {CASE} on {DATE} from {FIRST} {LAST} seeking copies of the last three annual audits and all purchase orders over {AMOUNT}. Statutory deadline is {DATE}. Please pull the responsive records and send them to my office in electronic format. If any records require redaction for exempt financial data, flag those separately and I'll coordinate with the attorney. Let me know by {DATE} if there are any responsiveness questions.

subject_tmpl: Board Meeting Agenda – Permit Appeal Item – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Rosa, the appeal filed by {FIRST} {LAST} regarding denied permit {CASE} at {ADDRESS} has been scheduled for the {DATE} board meeting. Can you prepare a one-page staff report summarizing the basis for denial, applicable code sections, and your recommendation? I need the report by {DATE} to include in the packet. If there are photographs or supporting exhibits, please send those as separate attachments.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I'll have the staff report to you by {DATE}. The denial was based on setback requirements under Section {NUM} of the building code. I'll include the site survey and inspection photos.

subject_tmpl: Food Establishment License Renewal – {BIZ} – Inspection Clearance Needed
body_tmpl: Priya, I have a license renewal application from {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. Their food establishment license expires {DATE}. Per our renewal process, I need a current inspection clearance from your office before I can issue the new license. The {DATE} inspection report I have on file shows two minor violations — please confirm those have been corrected on re-inspection. Application fee of {AMOUNT} has been collected.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I completed the re-inspection on {DATE}. Both violations corrected. Clearance granted for {BIZ}. I'll send the signed clearance form this afternoon.

subject_tmpl: FOIA {CASE} – Public Works Records Needed by {DATE}
body_tmpl: Frank, FOIA request {CASE} asks for all inspection reports and maintenance logs for {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} from {DATE} to {DATE}. I need whatever you have by {DATE} — please include contractor invoices if the work was outsourced. If any records are missing or were not retained under our schedule, note that in your transmittal so I can address it in the response letter. Thanks.

Mayor Okonkwo, please find the draft agenda for the {DATE} regular Village Board meeting attached for your review. Items include: (1) approval of minutes from {DATE}, (2) liquor license renewal – {BIZ}, (3) Ordinance {NUM} – second reading, (4) contract award to {BIZ} for {AMOUNT}, (5) public comment period. I need your revisions by {DATE} so I can publish the agenda and post notice per the Open Meetings Act. Let me know if you want to add or remove any items.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, agenda looks good. Move item 3 to after public comment. Add an executive session notice at the end for personnel. Everything else is fine.

body_tmpl: Reggie, FOIA case {CASE} from {FIRST} {LAST} requests incident reports from {DATE} to {DATE} at {ADDRESS}. Please pull any responsive reports and flag any that are exempt under FOIA — specifically anything involving juveniles or ongoing investigations. I need the packet from your office by {DATE}. If the chief wants to discuss exemptions before I respond, have them call my office directly.

David, please confirm receipt of {AMOUNT} from {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} for their {DATE} license renewal. I have a check in hand dated {DATE} but want your office to verify it clears before I issue the license. If there's a problem with the payment I'll hold the license and notify the applicant. Also, can you confirm their outstanding utility balance is zero? We require that for renewal.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, payment confirmed and check cleared on {DATE}. No outstanding utility balance for that account. You're clear to issue.

subject_tmpl: Sensitive FOIA Request – Mayor Review Requested – {CASE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I want to flag FOIA case {CASE} before responding. The requester, {FIRST} {LAST}, is asking for all communications between your office and {BIZ} from {DATE} through {DATE}. Given the pending contract discussion, I think we should have the village attorney review before I release anything. Deadline is {DATE}. I can send the extension notice today to buy us {DAYS} more days if you want to proceed that way. Your call.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, yes — send the extension notice today and forward the request to the attorney. Do not release anything from my office until I hear back from counsel.

body_tmpl: Rosa, attached are the draft minutes from the {DATE} Zoning Board of Appeals meeting for your review and certification. Please confirm the variance granted to {FIRST} {LAST} at {ADDRESS} is accurately described — specifically the setback dimensions and any conditions of approval. Once you sign off I'll prepare the official record and transmit to the mayor. Please return by {DATE}.

Karen, a new business license application has been received from {BIZ} proposing to operate at {ADDRESS}. The business type is {DEPT}. Per our process, I need sign-offs from Code Enforcement, the Building Official, and Health before I can issue. I've already sent referrals to those offices. Estimated processing time is {DAYS} days. The applicant, {FIRST} {LAST}, can be reached at {PHONE}. Please let me know if Village Manager approval is required at this stage.

Tom, FOIA request {CASE} asks for all engineering studies, stormwater reports, and grant applications related to the {STREET} corridor from {DATE} to present. Please search your files and transmit responsive records to my office by {DATE}. If any documents were prepared by consultants under contract with the Village, include those as well. Flag anything you believe may be exempt as a preliminary draft or deliberative document.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I have three responsive reports. One is a preliminary engineering study I believe qualifies for the deliberative process exemption — I'll send a memo on that. The other two are final and will be in your inbox by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Ordinance {NUM} – First Reading – Business Licensing Chapter Amendments
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, Ordinance {NUM} amending Chapter {NUM} of the Village Code on business licensing is ready for first reading at the {DATE} board meeting. Key changes: new home occupation permit requirements, updated annual fee schedule, and added enforcement penalties. The village attorney has reviewed the draft. I'll place it on the agenda under New Business. If the board approves first reading, second reading would be scheduled for {DATE}. Let me know if you'd like a summary memo prepared for the board packet.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, please prepare a one-page summary for the board packet. Keep it factual — just the what and why, no opinion. Thanks.

body_tmpl: Lorena, FOIA request {CASE} from {FIRST} {LAST} asks for all water billing records for account {ACCT} at {ADDRESS} from {DATE} to {DATE}. Please pull the account history and provide it in PDF format. If any records involve a dispute or payment arrangement, include those correspondence files as well. I need everything by {DATE} to meet our deadline. Let me know if there are any records retention issues.

Sandra, I'm referring a new home occupation permit application from {FIRST} {LAST} at {ADDRESS}. The applicant intends to operate a {BIZ} from their residence. Per our licensing ordinance, your office needs to verify compliance with the home occupation standards before I issue. Please complete your review within {DAYS} days and send me a written clearance or denial recommendation. The applicant's contact is {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I completed the inspection on {DATE}. No on-site employees or exterior signage observed. Home occupation standards appear met. Clearance granted — memo attached.

body_tmpl: Karen, I received a special event permit application from {BIZ} for an outdoor event on {STREET} on {DATE} from {TIME} to {TIME}. Expected attendance is {NUM}. They are requesting road closure on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. I've sent referrals to Public Works and Police. Before I approve, I need your sign-off given the street closure. Let me know if you want to discuss with the department heads first.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I'm fine with approval if PW and PD both clear it. Make the permit conditional on their written concurrence.

subject_tmpl: FOIA {CASE} – Parks Event Contracts and Vendor Agreements
body_tmpl: Kevin, FOIA case {CASE} requests all vendor contracts and agreements for the Taste of Bellwood events from {DATE} through {DATE}. Please search your files and send me copies of all signed vendor agreements, including any that were cancelled or not executed. If any agreements are with sole-source vendors, flag those separately. I need the documents by {DATE}.

Mayor Okonkwo, I am informing you of a liquor license violation report filed against {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} following an incident on {DATE}. The police report, case {CASE}, documents an alleged sale to a minor. Under our liquor code, I am required to schedule a show cause hearing within {DAYS} days. I can place this on the {DATE} agenda or convene a special hearing. Please advise on how you would like to proceed. The licensee has been notified by letter today.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, schedule this for the {DATE} regular meeting. Make sure the police liaison prepares a written summary of the incident for the board. I want full documentation in the packet.

body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, here is the monthly FOIA status summary. Received this month: {NUM} requests. Completed on time: {NUM}. Extended: {NUM}. Denied in full or part: {NUM}. Outstanding: {NUM}. The oldest open request, {CASE}, relates to {DEPT} records and is currently with the village attorney. No complaints have been filed with the PAC this month. Full log is available from my office on request.

subject_tmpl: Ordinance Publication Confirmation – Building Code Amendment {NUM}
body_tmpl: Rosa, Ordinance {NUM} amending the Bellwood Building Code was published in the {BIZ} on {DATE} per statutory requirements. The effective date is {DATE}. Please update your permit application forms and inspection checklists to reflect the new requirements before that date. If you need me to send you the enrolled ordinance copy for your records, just let me know.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, please send the enrolled copy. I'll update the forms and brief my inspection staff before the effective date.

subject_tmpl: License Revenue Report – Q{NUM} – Please Review Before Board Presentation
body_tmpl: David, attached is the draft Q{NUM} business license revenue report I'm preparing for the {DATE} board meeting. The numbers show {AMOUNT} collected in license fees this quarter. Before I present, can you reconcile against your revenue ledger and confirm the figure? Also note that {NUM} renewals are still outstanding — those accounts total approximately {AMOUNT}. Let me know if the figures match your records.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, figures reconcile. One correction: the outstanding renewals total is {AMOUNT}, not {AMOUNT} — two accounts paid after your cutoff date. I'll send the corrected breakdown.

subject_tmpl: FOIA Training Reminder – Annual Compliance – Due {DATE}
body_tmpl: Karen, as a reminder, all Village department heads are required to complete the annual FOIA compliance training by {DATE} per our records management policy. I'll be distributing the online training link to all staff on {DATE}. Please make sure your department supervisors complete and return the acknowledgment form to my office within {DAYS} days. Completion records are audited by the State's Attorney's office annually.

Reggie, I have a new liquor license application from {FIRST} {LAST} for {BIZ} proposed at {ADDRESS}. Per our liquor ordinance, I need a background check on the applicant and all listed officers. SSN and DOB are in the sealed envelope attached. Please return results to my office within {DAYS} days. If you have any findings that would affect licensability, please notify me and the Mayor before I schedule this for the board.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, background check complete. No disqualifying findings for {FIRST} {LAST}. Results packet is in the inter-office envelope on its way to you now.

body_tmpl: Rosa, FOIA case {CASE} requests the complete permit history for {ADDRESS} from {DATE} to present, including all applications, inspections, and certificates of occupancy. Please pull the full file and send me copies. If any permits were issued for work that was later found non-compliant, include the follow-up inspection records. Deadline is {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Proposed Ordinance {NUM} – Ready for Your Signature – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the board approved Ordinance {NUM} at the {DATE} meeting by a vote of {NUM}-{NUM}. The ordinance amends the licensing fee schedule effective {DATE}. The enrolled original is on your desk. Please sign and return to my office today if possible so I can file and publish before the {DATE} statutory deadline. A copy will go to Finance after filing.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, signed and returning now. Please make sure Finance gets their copy today.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood Vendor Licensing – {DATE} Deadline Reminder
body_tmpl: Kevin, the deadline for Taste of Bellwood food vendor temporary license applications is {DATE}. I currently have {NUM} applications pending and {NUM} that are complete. Several vendors are missing their health inspection clearances from Priya's office. Can you send a reminder to your vendor list? I won't issue temporary licenses without a signed clearance from the Health Officer. Let me know if you need the application checklist resent to anyone.

Priya, FOIA case {CASE} from {FIRST} {LAST} requests all inspection reports for {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} for the past {NUM} years. Please send me the complete inspection file including any critical violation notices, follow-up reports, and closure orders. If any records are part of an active enforcement action, flag those so I can consult with the attorney on potential exemptions. Deadline is {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, I have {NUM} inspection reports responsive to this request. No active enforcement on {BIZ} currently. I'll have the records to you by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Annual License Renewal Cycle – Status Summary – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Karen, here is the status of the annual business license renewal cycle as of {DATE}. Total active licenses: {NUM}. Renewals received: {NUM}. Renewals outstanding: {NUM}. Suspended accounts pending code clearance: {NUM}. I plan to begin sending delinquency notices on {DATE} for accounts that have not renewed. The {NUM} accounts with open code violations will be referred to your office for follow-up. Please let me know if you want to adjust the delinquency notice timeline.

Mayor Okonkwo, I am informing you that FOIA request {CASE} from {FIRST} {LAST} has been denied in part under the privacy exemption and the law enforcement exemption. The requester was asking for personnel records related to the {DATE} incident. The attorney reviewed and concurred with the denial. The requester has the right to appeal to the Public Access Counselor within {DAYS} days. I wanted you to know before the denial letter goes out today.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, understood. If the requester files a PAC complaint, loop in the attorney immediately and copy Karen. Thanks for the heads up.

body_tmpl: Tom, attached is a right-of-way permit application from {BIZ} for utility work on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} starting {DATE}. Per our code, ROW permits of this scope require your engineering review and approval before I can issue. Please review the traffic control plan and bore specifications and send me your written concurrence or conditions by {DATE}. The applicant contact is {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Yolanda, reviewed the application. I'll approve with conditions — require an inspector on site for the bore and a {DAYS}-day restoration window after backfill. I'll send the formal concurrence by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Meeting Minutes – {DATE} Regular Board Meeting – Approved for Your Records
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the minutes from the {DATE} regular Village Board meeting were approved at the {DATE} subsequent meeting. The signed original is filed in the official minutes book. Key actions recorded: Ordinance {NUM} adopted, contract with {BIZ} approved in the amount of {AMOUNT}, and {NUM} liquor license renewals approved. A certified copy is attached for your files. Please contact my office if you need corrections or clarification on any item.
